title: Icons - Additions
description: This resource pack adds several missing icons
body:
## Description

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59b67418dbe6459b97fe19975693ef7b2fefd6f7.png)

This resource pack adds several missing icons:
- [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) icon on the main screen
- Attack indicator icon
- Frame rate icon
- Brightness icon
